12.anchor: I want you to know, brothers,
12.note: Or brothers and sisters. In New Testament usage, depending on the context, the plural Greek word

13.anchor: so that it has become known throughout the whole imperial guard

3.anchor: Yes, I ask you also, true companion,
help these women, who have labored

5.anchor: Have this mind among yourselves, which is yours in Christ Jesus,
